```python
import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/skills/bio-single-cell-annotation-celltypist/scripts/python')
from core_analysis import *
from utils import *
import anndata as ad, numpy as np, pandas as pd, scanpy as sc
from sklearn.metrics import adjusted_rand_score, normalized_mutual_info_score

IN = '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/backend/data/raw/default/PA12_sc.h5ad'
OUT = '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/backend/data/workspaces/default/outputs'
os.makedirs(OUT, exist_ok=True)
MODEL, MODE, P_THRES = 'Immune_All_Low.pkl', 'best match', 0.5

adata = sc.read_h5ad(IN)
n_cells, n_genes = adata.shape
try: print('Validation:', validate_celltypist_input(adata, check_normalized=False))
except Exception as e: print('Validation warning:', e)

if 'counts' in adata.layers:
    adata.X = adata.layers['counts'].copy()
if float(adata.X.max()) > 30:
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4); sc.pp.log1p(adata)
    prep = 'raw counts (layer=counts) -> normalize_total(target_sum=1e4) -> log1p'
else:
    prep = 'X already normalized/log-transformed; used as-is'

download_celltypist_model(model=MODEL)
res = annotate_cells(adata, model=MODEL, mode=MODE, p_thres=P_THRES, majority_voting=True)
lab = res.predicted_labels
col = 'majority_voting' if 'majority_voting' in lab.columns else 'predicted_labels'
preds = lab[col].astype(str).reindex(adata.obs_names)
conf = lab['conf_score'] if 'conf_score' in lab.columns else pd.Series(np.nan, index=lab.index)
conf = pd.to_numeric(conf, errors='coerce').reindex(adata.obs_names).values
adata.obs['celltypist_predicted'] = preds.values
adata.obs['celltypist_conf_score'] = conf

comp = pd.DataFrame({'all_celltype': adata.obs['all_celltype'].astype(str).values,
                     'celltypist_predicted': preds.values,
                     'celltypist_conf_score': conf}, index=adata.obs_names.astype(str))
comp.rename_axis('cell_id').reset_index().to_csv(f'{OUT}/annotations.csv', index=False)
comp.to_csv(f'{OUT}/celltypist_comparison.csv', index=False)

unassigned = float((preds == 'Unassigned').mean())
ari = adjusted_rand_score(comp['all_celltype'], comp['celltypist_predicted'])
nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(comp['all_celltype'], comp['celltypist_predicted'])
m = load_celltypist_model(MODEL)
feats = getattr(m, 'features', [])
overlap = len(set(feats) & set(adata.var_names))
per = comp.assign(match=comp['all_celltype'] == comp['celltypist_predicted']).groupby('all_celltype')['match'].agg(['mean', 'size'])
xtab = pd.crosstab(comp['all_celltype'], comp['celltypist_predicted'])

ad.settings.allow_write_nullable_strings = True
adata.obs.index = adata.obs.index.astype(str); adata.var.index = adata.var.index.astype(str)
for c in adata.obs.columns:
    if str(adata.obs[c].dtype) == 'string': adata.obs[c] = adata.obs[c].astype(object)
adata.write_h5ad(f'{OUT}/annotated.h5ad')

with open(f'{OUT}/comparison_report.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write(f'Cross-tab all_celltype (rows) vs celltypist_predicted (cols)\n{xtab.to_string()}\n\nPer-label agreement (match fraction, n)\n{per.to_string()}\n')
with open(f'{OUT}/report.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write(f'Cells x genes: {n_cells} x {n_genes}\nModel: {MODEL}\nGene overlap: {overlap} of {len(feats)} model genes found in data\nMode: {MODE}\nThreshold: p_thres={P_THRES}, majority_voting=True\nUnassigned rate: {unassigned:.4f}\nPreprocessing: {prep}\nARI vs all_celltype: {ari:.4f}\nNMI vs all_celltype: {nmi:.4f}\nPer-label agreement:\n{per.to_string()}\n')

print(f'Saved to {OUT}: annotated.h5ad, annotations.csv, celltypist_comparison.csv, comparison_report.txt, report.txt')
print(f'Summary: {n_cells}x{n_genes}, overlap={overlap}, ARI={ari:.3f}, NMI={nmi:.3f}, Unassigned={unassigned:.3f}')
```

5946a14bef7cfd546ccf637cc71ac6b1e8379f4d.content:
```python
import sys, os
import pandas as pd, scanpy as sc, anndata
from sklearn.metrics import adjusted_rand_score, normalized_mutual_info_score

sys.path.insert(0, '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/skills/bio-single-cell-annotation-celltypist/scripts/python')
from core_analysis import *
from utils import *

IN  = '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/backend/data/workspaces/default/data/PA12_small.h5ad'
OUT = '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/backend/data/workspaces/default/outputs'
os.makedirs(OUT, exist_ok=True)
MODEL, MODE, P_THRES = 'Immune_All_Low.pkl', 'best match', 0.5

adata = sc.read_h5ad(IN)
validate_celltypist_input(adata)

# --- Preprocessing: normalize from raw counts if needed ---
norm = False
if 'counts' in adata.layers:
    adata.X = adata.layers['counts'].copy(); norm = True
if float(adata.X.max()) > 30:
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4); sc.pp.log1p(adata); norm = True
prep = 'raw counts -> normalize_total(target_sum=1e4) + log1p' if norm else 'input already log-normalized; used as-is'

# --- Model + annotation ---
download_celltypist_model(model=MODEL)
model = load_celltypist_model(MODEL)
feats = set(getattr(model, 'features', []))
overlap = len(feats & set(adata.var_names))
annotate_cells(adata, model=MODEL, mode=MODE, p_thres=P_THRES, majority_voting=True)
pred_col = 'majority_voting' if 'majority_voting' in adata.obs else 'predicted_labels'

# --- Comparison with existing all_celltype labels ---
comp = pd.DataFrame({'all_celltype': adata.obs['all_celltype'].astype(str),
                     'celltypist_predicted': adata.obs[pred_col].astype(str),
                     'celltypist_conf_score': adata.obs['conf_score'].astype(float)},
                    index=adata.obs_names.astype(str))
comp.to_csv(os.path.join(OUT, 'celltypist_comparison.csv'))
comp[['celltypist_predicted', 'celltypist_conf_score']].to_csv(os.path.join(OUT, 'annotations.csv'))

unassigned = float((comp.celltypist_predicted == 'Unassigned').mean())
ari = adjusted_rand_score(comp.all_celltype, comp.celltypist_predicted)
nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(comp.all_celltype, comp.celltypist_predicted)
per = comp.groupby('all_celltype')['celltypist_predicted'].agg(
    lambda s: f"n={len(s)} top={s.mode()[0]} agree={s.value_counts().iloc[0]/len(s):.3f}")
per_label = '\n'.join(f"{k}\t{v}" for k, v in per.items())
ctab = pd.crosstab(comp.all_celltype, comp.celltypist_predicted)

with open(os.path.join(OUT, 'comparison_report.txt'), 'w') as f:
    f.write(f"CellTypist vs all_celltype\nARI={ari:.4f}\tNMI={nmi:.4f}\tUnassigned={unassigned:.3f}\n\n")
    f.write("Per-label agreement:\n" + per_label + "\n\nCrosstab:\n" + ctab.to_string())

report = (f"Cells x genes: {adata.n_obs} x {adata.n_vars}\nModel: {MODEL}\n"
          f"Gene overlap: {overlap}/{max(len(feats),1)} model features ({100*overlap/max(len(feats),1):.1f}%)\n"
          f"Mode: {MODE}\nThreshold (p_thres): {P_THRES}\n"
          f"Unassigned rate: {unassigned:.3f}\nPreprocessing: {prep}\n"
          f"ARI vs all_celltype: {ari:.4f}\nNMI vs all_celltype: {nmi:.4f}\n"
          f"Per-label agreement (all_celltype -> top CellTypist):\n{per_label}\n")
open(os.path.join(OUT, 'report.txt'), 'w').write(report)

anndata.settings.allow_write_nullable_strings = True
for df in (adata.obs, adata.var):
    df.index = df.index.astype(str)
    for c in df.columns:
        if 'str' in str(df[c].dtype):
            df[c] = df[c].astype(str)
adata.write_h5ad(os.path.join(OUT, 'annotated.h5ad'))
print(f"Done. ARI={ari:.3f} NMI={nmi:.3f} Unassigned={unassigned:.3f} -> {OUT}")
```

ff553f9682c7057aa6c0742d257166a459bbf1fd.content:
```python
import sys, os, json
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
import scanpy as sc, anndata
from sklearn.metrics import adjusted_rand_score, normalized_mutual_info_score
sys.path.insert(0, '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/skills/bio-single-cell-annotation-celltypist/scripts/python')
from core_analysis import *
from utils import *

WS = '/mnt/c/Users/guoyang/Desktop/TEST/HomomicsLab/backend/data/workspaces/default'
OUT = os.path.join(WS, 'outputs'); os.makedirs(OUT, exist_ok=True)
MODEL, MODE, P_THRES = 'Immune_All_Low.pkl', 'best match', 0.5
anndata.settings.allow_write_nullable_strings = True

adata = sc.read_h5ad(os.path.join(WS, 'data', 'PA12_small.h5ad'))
if 'counts' in adata.layers:
    adata.X = adata.layers['counts'].copy()
    prep = 'raw counts taken from layer "counts", then normalize_total(target_sum=1e4) + log1p'
else:
    prep = 'WARNING: no counts layer; existing X assumed raw counts, then normalize_total(target_sum=1e4) + log1p'
sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4); sc.pp.log1p(adata)
validate_celltypist_input(adata, check_normalized=True)
download_celltypist_model(MODEL)
overlap = int(len(np.intersect1d(adata.var_names, load_celltypist_model(MODEL).features)))

res = annotate_cells(adata, model=MODEL, mode=MODE, p_thres=P_THRES, majority_voting=True, use_GPU=False)
pl = res.predicted_labels
pred = (pl['majority_voting'] if 'majority_voting' in pl.columns else pl['predicted_labels']).astype(str)
conf = pl['conf_score'] if 'conf_score' in pl.columns else pd.Series(np.nan, index=pl.index)
truth = adata.obs['all_celltype'].astype(str)

adata.obs['celltypist_predicted'] = pred
adata.obs['celltypist_conf_score'] = conf.astype(float)
adata.obs.index = adata.obs.index.astype(str); adata.var.index = adata.var.index.astype(str)
for df in (adata.obs, adata.var):
    for c in df.columns:
        if str(df[c].dtype).startswith('string'):
            df[c] = df[c].astype(object).where(pd.notna(df[c]), None)

ari = adjusted_rand_score(truth, pred); nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(truth, pred)
unassigned = float((pred == 'Unassigned').mean())
pl.to_csv(os.path.join(OUT, 'annotations.csv'))
pd.DataFrame({'all_celltype': truth, 'celltypist_predicted': pred,
              'celltypist_conf_score': conf.astype(float)}).to_csv(os.path.join(OUT, 'celltypist_comparison.csv'))
ct = pd.crosstab(truth, pred, normalize='index').round(3)
agree = pd.DataFrame({'top_celltypist_label': ct.idxmax(axis=1), 'agreement': ct.max(axis=1),
                      'n_cells': truth.value_counts()})
open(os.path.join(OUT, 'comparison_report.txt'), 'w').write(
    'Per all_celltype label agreement with CellTypist predictions\n\n' + agree.to_string()
    + '\n\nRow-normalized crosstab (all_celltype x celltypist_predicted):\n' + ct.to_string())

rep = [f'Cells x Genes: {adata.n_obs} x {adata.n_vars}', f'Model: {MODEL}',
       f'Gene overlap (model features vs data genes): {overlap}', f'Mode: {MODE}',
       f'p_thres: {P_THRES}', 'Majority voting: True', f'Preprocessing: {prep}',
       f'Unassigned rate: {unassigned:.3f}', f'ARI vs all_celltype: {ari:.3f}',
       f'NMI vs all_celltype: {nmi:.3f}', 'Per-label agreement:', agree.to_string()]
open(os.path.join(OUT, 'report.txt'), 'w').write('\n'.join(rep))

adata.write_h5ad(os.path.join(OUT, 'annotated.h5ad'))
files = ['outputs/annotated.h5ad', 'outputs/annotations.csv', 'outputs/celltypist_comparison.csv',
         'outputs/comparison_report.txt', 'outputs/report.txt']
json.dump({'outputs': files}, open(os.path.join(WS, '__skill_outputs__.json'), 'w'), indent=2)
print('\n'.join(rep[:10])); print('\nOutputs written:'); [print(' -', f) for f in files]
```
